headline: Citigroup Maintains Neutral on Mid-America Apartment, Lowers Price Target to $143
summary: Citigroup  analyst Nick Joseph   maintains Mid-America Apartment (NYSE:MAA) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $148 to $143.

headline: MAA sees strong Sun Belt demand, rent growth ahead
summary: The Memphis, Tennessee-based REIT is seeing early signs of rent pricing recovery, with stronger momentum expected into peak leasing season.
